description:
Goal:
Create a browser automation wrapper with safety boundaries.

Scope:
- Playwright install/runtime helper
- browser context management
- timeout/rate-limit settings
- screenshot/log artifact redaction policy
- registry URL allowlist enforcement
- CAPTCHA/access-control detection hook placeholder

Acceptance:
- Can navigate only to registry-allowed URLs.
- No page.evaluate with registry/user-supplied strings.
- No screenshots containing PII are saved by default.
- CAPTCHA detection path returns manual_required.
- No real broker adapter yet.
title: Add safe Playwright runtime wrapper
